title: pinus jeffreyi subsp. baja-californica
intro: Pinus jeffreyi subsp. baja-californica, also known as Baja California Jeffrey Pine, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree that is native to the Baja California Peninsula in Mexico. The medicinal properties of Pinus jeffreyi subsp. baja-californica include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of using this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing irritated airways, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. Pinus jeffreyi subsp. baja-californica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
